title: Saro´s Road Signs
description: Adds functional traffic lights, speed signs, stop signs, and custom sign packs with 3D models and sounds. Pairs with Saro's Road Blocks for complete road infrastructure.
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Signs/BH_SRS_header.webp)


![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Signs/BH_SRS_overview.webp)

Saro's Road Signs adds a complete set of functional traffic lights, speed signs, stop signs, yield signs, directional markers, and custom sign packs to Minecraft — each with realistic 3D models and sounds. Traffic lights cycle automatically. Pairs perfectly with Saro's Road Blocks for full road infrastructure. Supports Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge for Minecraft 1.12.2 through 1.21+

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Signs/BH_SRS_features.webp)

- **Variety of Road Signs** 🛑
  - Includes stop signs, speed limits, and more, perfect for your road construction projects.

- **Custom User Sign Packs (New!)** 🎨🆕
  - Introduced in **version 4.0**.  
  - Players can create and load their own sign packs using `/saros_roadsigns reload`.  
  - This feature is experimental, so please report any bugs on our Discord.  
  - An `example` pack is created in the .minecraft folder, where you can view it and see how a pack is created. 

- **New Traffic Light System** 🚦 **(Redesigned in 4.6!)**
  - Single **Traffic Light** block with 6 states (Off, Red, Red-Yellow, Green, Yellow, Flashing-Yellow).
  - **Traffic Light Controller** block manages up to unlimited linked lights with configurable timing for each phase.
  - Use the **Tuner** to link/unlink lights to a controller (click light → click controller).
  - Supports **two-direction mode** (A/B) — perfect for crossroad setups.
  - Controller GUI lets you configure each timing value independently.
  - Activate with **Redstone** (can be toggled in config). Without power: all lights flash yellow.
  
- **Multiplayer and Survival Compatibility** 🌐
  - Seamlessly integrates into both multiplayer and survival environments.

- **Custom Content** 🎨
  - Features custom sounds, models, and textures for a unique gameplay experience.

- **Mod Compatibility** 🔄
  - Pairs well with [Saro's Road Blocks](https://modrinth.com/project/saros-road-blocks) to complete your road construction projects.
-

- **Forge 1.21.11**
- **Forge 1.21.10**
- **Forge 1.21.9**
- **Forge 1.21.8**
- **Forge 1.21.7**
- **Forge 1.21.6**
- **Forge 1.21.5**
- **Forge 1.21.3**
- **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 1.21.1**
- **Forge 1.20.6**
- **Forge 1.20.4**
- **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 1.20.1**

### Discontinued❌
- **Forge 1.19.4**
- **Forge 1.19.2**
- **Forge 1.18.2**
- **Forge 1.16.5**

![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Signs/BH_SRS_community.webp)

For requests, suggestions, or bug reports, join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and become part of the Saro's Mod community. We look forward to your feedback!

[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Road_Signs/BH_SRS_promo.webp "Bisect Hosting")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "Bisect Hosting")


Texture Credits: [Traffic control](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/traffic-control)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
